name: tunnel-monitor
description: Monitor and auto-recover Cloudflare tunnels for IronClaw

tools.name: tunnel_check_status
tools.description: Check if Cloudflare tunnel is alive and accessible. Verifies process running, URL available, DNS resolution, endpoint accessibility, and optional Telegram webhook sync.

tunnel_url.description: Cloudflare tunnel URL (reads from /tmp/cloudflared-ephemeral-url.txt if not provided)

check_telegram.description: Whether to check Telegram webhook sync

telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram bot token for webhook verification

tools.returns: TunnelHealthReport with status, checks array, tunnel_url, process_pid, and recovery_actions

tools.name: tunnel_test_endpoint
tools.description: Test webhook endpoint accessibility and measure response time. Returns HTTP status code, response time, and size.

tunnel_url.description: Cloudflare tunnel URL (reads from file if not provided)

tools.returns: Object with url, status_code, response_time_ms, response_size_bytes, success boolean, and optional error

tools.name: tunnel_restart_if_dead
tools.description: Auto-restart dead Cloudflare tunnel. Checks tunnel health, kills old process if needed, starts new tunnel, extracts URL, and optionally updates Telegram webhook.

local_port.description: Local port for tunnel to expose

telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram bot token for webhook update

telegram_webhook_path.description: Webhook path to register with Telegram

tools.returns: RecoveryResult with success boolean, new_url, new_pid, webhook_updated boolean, error, and actions array

tools.name: tunnel_update_webhook
tools.description: Update Telegram webhook with current tunnel URL. Compares expected vs current webhook URL and updates if mismatch detected.

tunnel_url.description: Tunnel URL (reads from file if not provided)

webhook_path.description: Webhook path to append to tunnel URL

drop_pending_updates.description: Whether to drop pending updates when updating webhook

tools.returns: WebhookSyncResult with updated boolean, current_url, expected_url, telegram_info, and optional error

error_codes.530: Origin DNS error - tunnel not connected
error_codes.521: Web server is down - origin service unreachable
error_codes.524: Timeout occurred - origin took too long
error_codes.1033: Cloudflare is unable to reach your origin server
